title: cynanchum surrubriflorum
intro: Cynanchum surrubriflorum, also known as the yellow or yellow-leafed swallowwort, is a species of flowering plant in the milkweed family (Apocynaceae). Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Cynanchum surrubriflorum is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating menstrual cramps, and supporting respiratory health. Cynanchum surrubriflorum is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and treat various ailments.
